title: Libat el-Sitt
writer: Nagib El-Rihani, Badi Khayri, Pierre Louÿs
actors: Nagib El-Rihani, Tahiyyah Karyuka, Suleiman Naguib
plot: The film takes place in the city of Cairo during the Second World War, when Hasan Abu-Tabaq (Nagib El-Rihani) meets the girl Libah (Tahiyyah Karyuka). Feelings of love grow between then while Hasan struggles to find work. But thin...
